name: instant — customer-visible backup health
description: Operator-facing board to answer 'did the customer's backup succeed?' in <30s. Per-team success rate, median duration, and the last 50 backup operations. Pulled when a pro/team customer pings support about a backup. Source: Log records with audit_kind IN ('backup.requested', 'backup.succeeded', 'backup.failed', 'restore.requested', 'restore.succeeded', 'restore.failed') emitted from api/internal/handlers/backup.go (W5-B-api). Each event carries backup_id, team_id, tier, duration_seconds, and bytes.

pages.name: Backup health
pages.description: Per-team backup success + duration for support triage

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT filter(count(*), WHERE audit_kind = 'backup.succeeded') / (filter(count(*), WHERE audit_kind = 'backup.succeeded') + filter(count(*), WHERE audit_kind = 'backup.failed')) * 100 AS 'success %' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind LIKE 'backup.%' AND audit_kind != 'backup.requested' SINCE 24 hours ago

SELECT percentile(duration_seconds, 50) AS 'p50 s', percentile(duration_seconds, 95) AS 'p95 s' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind = 'backup.succeeded' AND duration_seconds IS NOT NULL SINCE 24 hours ago

SELECT count(*) AS 'requested', filter(count(*), WHERE audit_kind = 'backup.succeeded') AS 'succeeded', filter(count(*), WHERE audit_kind = 'backup.failed') AS 'failed' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind LIKE 'backup.%' SINCE 24 hours ago

SELECT filter(count(*), WHERE audit_kind = 'backup.succeeded') AS 'succeeded', filter(count(*), WHERE audit_kind = 'backup.failed') AS 'failed', percentile(duration_seconds, 50) AS 'p50 dur s', percentile(duration_seconds, 95) AS 'p95 dur s' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind LIKE 'backup.%' AND audit_kind != 'backup.requested' FACET team_id, tier SINCE 7 days ago LIMIT 50
SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind = 'backup.failed' FACET fail_reason SINCE 7 days ago LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Recent 50 backup ops (paste backup_id into support ticket)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT timestamp, audit_kind, team_id, tier, backup_id, duration_seconds, bytes, fail_reason FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind LIKE 'backup.%' SINCE 24 hours ago LIMIT 50

SELECT filter(count(*), WHERE audit_kind = 'restore.succeeded') / (filter(count(*), WHERE audit_kind = 'restore.succeeded') + filter(count(*), WHERE audit_kind = 'restore.failed')) * 100 AS 'restore success %' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind LIKE 'restore.%' AND audit_kind != 'restore.requested' TIMESERIES 1 hour SINCE 7 days ago
SELECT sum(bytes) AS 'bytes backed up' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind = 'backup.succeeded' FACET team_id, tier SINCE 7 days ago LIMIT 25
